title: Morena Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Morena with a Z-Score of +7.20. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Morena is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 24.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 15% and the wind speed is at 17.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
